info.name: Homestay Review Insight AI API Collection (W4)
info.description: API collection for testing Homestay Review Insight AI backend REST endpoints (Week 4 Deliverable)

request.description: Verifies that the server is up and responding.

query.description: Search text inside reviews or property names

request.description: Fetch all analyzed reviews stored in memory with optional search parameters.

response.name: Get Reviews Success
response.body:
[
    {
        "id": "r1",
        "propertyName": "Sunset Haven Villa",
        "text": "We had the most wonderful stay! The host left us fresh cookies, the house was immaculate, and the beds were so comfy. 10/10 will come back!",
        "sentiment": "positive",
        "score": 98,
        "themes": [
            "Hospitality",
            "Cleanliness",
            "Comfort"
        ],
        "reply": "Hi Guest,\n\nThank you so much for your glowing review! We are absolutely thrilled to hear you enjoyed the cookies and found the beds comfortable. Maintaining an immaculate home and providing top-notch hospitality here at Sunset Haven Villa is our priority. We look forward to welcoming you back for another 10/10 stay!\n\nBest regards,\nSunset Haven Villa Team",
        "createdAt": "2026-06-24T16:09:19.450Z",
        "status": "responded"
    }
]

request.description: Calculates statistics dynamically from the saved reviews.
Get detailed data about a single review report.

response.name: Get Single Review Success
response.body:

request.description: Submit a review text to generate an AI reply draft and store it.

response.name: Create Review Success
response.body:
{
    "id": "xyz789",
    "propertyName": "Ocean Breeze Inn",
    "text": "This place was wonderful! Close to the shore, very clean, but the keys were hard to find.",
    "sentiment": "mixed",
    "score": 54,
    "themes": [
        "Cleanliness",
        "Comfort",
        "Amenities"
    ],
    "reply": "Hi Guest,\n\nThank you for sharing your feedback. We are happy that you enjoyed elements of your stay at Ocean Breeze Inn. However, we sincerely apologize for the issues you experienced with cleanliness, comfort, amenities. We are addressing these issues immediately to improve our service. We hope to host you again for a better experience.\n\nBest regards,\nOcean Breeze Inn Team",
    "createdAt": "2026-06-27T16:10:04.567Z",
    "status": "responded"
}

request.description: Updates the response draft or status of an existing review report.

response.name: Update Review Success
response.body:
{
    "id": "r1",
    "propertyName": "Sunset Haven Villa",
    "text": "We had the most wonderful stay! The host left us fresh cookies, the house was immaculate, and the beds were so comfy. 10/10 will come back!",
    "sentiment": "positive",
    "score": 98,
    "themes": [
        "Hospitality",
        "Cleanliness",
        "Comfort"
    ],
    "reply": "Hi Guest, thank you for your review! We apologize for the key issue and have resolved it.",

    "status": "responded",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-27T16:10:05.120Z"
}

request.description: Simulates syncing reviews from Airbnb and VRBO channels into local memory.

response.name: Sync Reviews Success
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "3 reviews synced from Airbnb & Vrbo!",
    "syncedCount": 3,
    "reviews": [
        {
            "id": "ab123",
            "propertyName": "Sunset Haven Villa",
            "text": "Stunning property! The view is breathtaking and everything was exactly as shown in photos. Highly recommend!",
            "sentiment": "positive",
            "score": 95,
            "themes": ["View", "Accuracy", "Highly Recommended"],
            "reply": "Hi Guest,\n\nThank you so much for the review! We're glad you enjoyed the breathtaking view and found the property matched our photos. Hope to host you again!\n\nBest, Sunset Haven Villa Team",
            "createdAt": "2026-06-27T16:10:05.890Z",
            "status": "responded"
        }
    ]
}

request.description: Deletes a review report from history.
